pricing.title: Pick the right plan for your business

items.name: Teams
items.subtitle: For growing teams
features: Ability for staff to use their own Stripe account

items.name: Enterprise
items.subtitle: For large companies
items.text: Enterprise solutions available for high-volume businesses with over 20 team members

items.name: Email notifications
items.description: Your customers will get a timely email reminder of their upcoming booking. To minimize no-shows

items.name: Timezone-optimized bookings
items.description: Your booking times will be translated to the timezone of your customer's location.

items.name: Block off breaks and personal time
items.description: Block off times for those moments when you need it

items.name: SMS notifications
items.description: Your customers will get a timely sms reminder of their upcoming booking. To minimize no-shows

items.name: Customized schedule for each staff
items.description: Your employees have the ability to customize their available opening hours and closing hours

items.name: Booking website
items.description: Choose from a list of curated website templates and customize to your business

items.name: Marketplace booking page
items.description: Get free placement on the Bookisia marketplace to boost your business

items.name: Sync appointment with calendars
items.description: When you add google calendar as an integration, a new event will automatically be added when your customers book your services

items.name: Add new staff
items.description: New employees get access to their own dashboard and can manage their hours and appointments

items.name: Enforce business opening hours across staff
items.description: Staff can modify their opening hours except if restricted by business

items.name: Enforce single business calendar across staff
items.description: Staff can use their own calendar except if restricted by business

items.name: Service pricing and durations per employee
items.description: Staff can modify their pricing and service durations except if restricted by business

items.question: Can I upgrade/downgrade anytime?
items.answer: Yes, if you feel your business would benefit from the features in another plan or you no longer require some features in a specific plan, you can upgrade or downgrade at anytime. You will be charged a prorated amount which takes into consideration the amount of days you spent on your current plan and the amount of time you will spend on the new plan before your next billing window.

items.question: I have an issue what do I do?
items.answer: Our team of expert customer support are happy to help you with any questions you may have. You can call or reach out to us anytime.

items.question: Can I request a new feature?
items.answer: We encourage our customers to reach out to us about any feature they would like to see on our platform. We are actively improving our platforms with new features and we welcome all suggestions offered to us by our customers.

items.question: How long does my free trial last?
items.answer: Every plan comes with a 30 day free trial. You will get a notification three days before your trial expires. We value transparency and will notify you when your first charge is about to occur. After your trial expires, we will charge you automatically.

items.question: I want to host my store on a private domain
items.answer: Every business on bookisia can choose to host their store on a private domain. Contact  our support team and we will begin the setup process.

items.question: I have signed up for a new plan. What next?
items.answer: Congrats! Head over to your very own admin portal. There you can provide more information about your business. Add your staff and set your business hours. You can also upload your brand information such as your business logo so that it is shown on your bookisia website.
